scripts.build: pnpm --filter @atom-eve/schemas build && pnpm --filter @atom-eve/registry-generator build && pnpm --filter atom-eve build && pnpm --filter @atom-eve/web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @atom-eve/schemas typecheck && pnpm --filter @atom-eve/registry-generator typecheck && pnpm --filter @atom-eve/registry-generator build && pnpm --filter atom-eve typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm generate && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm verify:fixtures && pnpm secret-scan
